title: Survey and establish site levels
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Survey and establish site levels demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Undertake site survey

pcs.text: Test survey equipment calibration and maintain survey equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Test survey equipment calibration and maintain survey equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Test survey equipment calibration and maintain survey equipment.
